name: Makoto Ozone
abstract: Makoto Ozone (小曽根真; Pronounced [Oh-zone'-ay]; born March 25, 1961) is a Japanese jazz pianist.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival New York: Makoto Ozone

works.t: There Will Never Be Another You

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Nina Simone/ A Tribute to Benny Goodman and Lionel Hampton

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Makoto used to say to me, he said, “You know why we play so well together?” ... In fact Makoto and I toured around for about three years because of that record we made.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Wilson interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 27, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: Some of the good shows were done in there, like with Teddy, Eubie Blake, Mary Lou Williams, Hazel Scott, Bill Evans, John Lewis, Makoto Ozone, Albert Dailey, people that aren’t around now, unfortunately.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
